upasargachandrika.example_text: 'prASnanti brAhmaRA odanam' (Apa0 SrO0 5273) api praSabda AdikarmaRi syAt yaTA SiSukamaDikftya vihite'nnaprASanAKye gfhye karmaRi
prASitABirantarAsyapravizwABiriti kullUkaH vyaktaM praSabdo'trAdikarmaRi pAne'pyaSnAtiH prasidDaH apo'SAnetyAdizu tadarTasya darSanAt
'aDa prASAna ftuTA havIMzi' (f0 11705) iha praSabda AdikarmaRi na prakarze vartate kaRehatya BuNkzvetyarTaH
'pUrvA vratasya prASnatI' (aTarva0 61332) praSabdaH pUrvatAmAha prASnatI yA pUrvamaSnAti sA
'mfdvIkA rasitA sitA samaSitA' (BAminI0 47) samaSitA aSitA nArTaH samA samaSanaM tu saMBUyASanamAha yaTA samAjezu samASezu samavAyezu ityatra (pA0 sU0 1150 BAzye)
'aTa yatsrucaM niraSnAti tena devajanAn prIRAti' (jE0 brA0 141)
'pAwAmindro vyASnAt' (aTarva0 2274) vyASnAt=aBuNkta viSabda uBayatrArTasya viSezako na
'virudvADyaSanAjIrREstaTEzAtyaSanAdapi' (kA0 saM0 Kila0 antarvatnI0 Slo0 67) prAgBuktamannaM yAvanna jIryati tAvadaSanamaDyaSanam sAjIrRe Bujyate yattu tadaDyaSanamucyate (suSrute)
'ahaM patInnAtiSaye nAtyaSne nAtiBUzaye' (BA0 vana0 23338) nAtyaSne=nAtyaSnAmi nAtikramyASnAmItyAha yAvanme patayo BuktA Bavanti tAvadeva BuYje na tataH prAg iti BAvaH
'kAmAdupASnanti sahasraSaste mudAnvitAH' (rA0 612413) upASnanti upaBuYjate upaSabdo DAtvarTasya na bahUpakaroti
'anavyavahitaM yo vA nedaM vAkyamupASnute' (BA0 SAM0 14224) upASnute'NgI karoti
